itinerary.title: Chikmagalur Full-Day Trekking
itinerary.description: Arrive in Chikmagalur, Karnataka's coffee capital. Embark on a full-day trekking (trucking) adventure up the scenic mountain trails. (Note: Itinerary details are subject to change).

itinerary.title: Mysore Heritage & Brindavan Gardens
itinerary.description: Travel to Mysore. Explore the grand Mysore Palace, visit the temple atop Chamundi Hills, and enjoy the evening musical fountains at Brindavan Gardens. (Note: Itinerary details are subject to change).

itinerary.title: Coorg Dubare, Nisargadhama & Golden Temple
itinerary.description: Drive to Coorg. Visit the Dubare Elephant Camp, walk through the bamboo forests of Nisargadhama, and marvel at the Namdroling Monastery Golden Temple before departure. (Note: Itinerary details are subject to change).

title: Chikmagalur, Mysore & Coorg Tour
description: Experience Karnataka's finest heritage and hill stations. Trek through the mist-covered coffee hills of Chikmagalur, admire the historic palaces of Mysore, and explore the waterfalls, elephant camps, and monasteries of Coorg.
highlights: Enjoy a full-day trekking (trucking) expedition in Chikmagalur
Tour the magnificent Mysore Palace and Chamundi Hills
Enjoy the colorful lights and water show at Brindavan Gardens
Interact with elephants at Dubare Elephant Camp in Coorg
Walk through Nisargadhama island and visit the Tibetan Golden Temple
Please note: Itinerary details are subject to change
